name: Fukuoka REIT Corporation
summary: Fukuoka REIT Corporation (securities code: 8968) is the first region-specific REIT in Japan. With our strength in knowing the local characteristics of real estate, which is a very regional-specific business, Fukuoka REIT manages a portfolio centering on superior design entertainment retail facilities and Class A office buildings in the entire Kyushu region centering on Fukuoka, Yamaguchi and Okinawa prefectures. Fukuoka REIT was registered in August 2004 and listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and Fukuoka Stock Exchange on June 21, 2005. Real estate management, acquisition arrangements of new properties, fund raising and other operations are contracted to its asset manager, Fukuoka Realty Co., Ltd.
